turns.content: Generate a header image for my blog post about AI agents

All versions generated and optimized.

📋 SUMMARY: Generated a charcoal-sketch blog header image for Jm's AI agents post.
🔍 ANALYSIS: Designed a conductor metaphor — central human figure directing four AI agent figures radiating outward toward tools (code, documents, data, interfaces). Captures the core concept: human intent, agent execution.
⚡ ACTIONS:
1. Ran full Essay workflow (CSE-24, emotion mapping, composition design, prompt construction)
2. Generated 2K image with Gemini 3 Pro (nano-banana-pro)
3. Validated: sienna on human, purple on agents, gestural charcoal technique, full frame, signature present
4. Optimized: 1024px (291KB), 512px thumb (81KB) from 3.1MB original

✅ RESULTS: Three versions in `~/Downloads/`:

| File | Size | Use |
|------|------|-----|
| `ai-agents-blog-header.png` | 3.1MB | Original archive (2048x2048) |
| `ai-agents-blog-header-optimized.png` | 291KB | Inline blog display (1024x1024) |
| `ai-agents-blog-header-thumb.png` | 81KB | Social/OpenGraph thumbnail (512x512) |

📊 STATUS: Image opened in Preview for your review. Note: background removal couldn't run (missing REMOVEBG_API_KEY) — the image has a light paper texture background rather than full transparency.
📁 CAPTURE: Conductor + agents composition; wonder/discovery register; 40:60 warm:cool ratio
➡️ NEXT: Let me know if you'd like adjustments (different angle, more/fewer agents, different style) or if this is approved for your blog post.

📖 STORY EXPLANATION:
1. Blog header needed for an AI agents post
2. Chose conductor metaphor: one human directing multiple autonomous agents
3. Central sienna-washed human figure represents human intent and warmth
4. Four purple-washed agent figures radiate outward — technology in action
5. Each agent reaches toward suggested tools (code, docs, data, interfaces)
6. Gestural charcoal technique with overlapping lines and hatching throughout
7. Optimized from 3.1MB to 291KB for web, 81KB thumbnail for social
8. Image captures the core thesis: AI agents are the bridge from intelligence to impact

⭐ RATE (1-10):

🗣️ Kaya: Blog header generated — conductor figure with four AI agents in charcoal sketch, optimized for web.
